title: Senior Revenue Manager at Sarovar Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Sarovar Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Sarovar Hotels in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sarovar Hotels:
Sarovar Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sarovar Hotels!
